en.value: Activity 1.1.1Form and strengthen the CDMCs (Community Disaster Management Committees)Activity 1.1.2Provide  life saving materials to the Ward Disaster Management CommitteesActivity 1.1.3Use electronic and print media for sensitization and dissemination of disaster related information to the communitiesActivity 1.1.4Link and inform the most vulnerable section of the community about the social security schemes they are entitled toActivity 1.1.5Conduct Participatory Disaster Risk Assessment (PDRA) for preparation of Community Disaster Risk Management Plan (CDRMP) and installation of hazard/social map in the community Activity 1.1.6Conduct inter-community learning visitsActivity 1.2.1Formation and revitalization of farmers groupsActivity 1.2.2Provide capacity building support for climate-smart agriculture (including climate-resilient (flood and drought) agriculture practices, training input support and development of crop calendar)Activity 1.2.3Establish seed banks in the target PalikasActivity 1.2.4Establish demonstration plots in the target PalikasActivity 1.3.1Provide support to strengthen financial service systemActivity 1.3.2Build capacity of saving groups including follow up and mentoringActivity 1.3.3Facilitate linkage of saving groups with other financial institutionsActivity 1.4.1Promote small-scale structural mitigation measuresActivity 1.4.2Construction of inclusive multipurpose community safe shelter with basic sanitation facilitiesActivity 1.4.3Provide support to communities on livestock shelter constructionActivity 1.5.1Carry out Feasibility Study to Anticipatory Action focusing on a multi-hazard in the targeted locationsActivity 1.5.2Confirm Triggers and Early Action ActivitiesActivity 1-5-3Support in development of Early Action ProtocolActivity 2.1.1Form and strengthen LDMCs (Local Disaster Management Committees) and TFs (Task Forces) at each target ward and PalikaActivity 2.1.2Organize workshop at the ward level to sensitize about the importance of LDMC and its functionsActivity 2.1.3Support in preparation of Disaster Preparedness and Response Plan (DPRP), Local Disaster Climate Resilience Plan (LDCRP), Emergency Fund Mobilization Guideline, Standard Operating Procedure of Local Emergency Operation Center (LEOC), Building code guideline, ToR of LDMCs and TaskforcesActivity 2.1.4Preparation manual of simulation/drill for specific hazard and operationalize itActivity 2.1.5DRRM and Humanitarian Standard training for LDMC membersActivity 2.2.1Support LG in mainstreaming DRR into regular Palika development planActivity 2.2.2Conduct sensitization workshop in the targeted community, ward and Palika for mainstreaming DRR into development plan (including budget allocation) following 7 steps planning process of Nepal GovernmentActivity 2.2.3Conduct a workshop at District level engaging both the district and Palika level stakeholders to develop a clear communication channel during disaster situationActivity 2.2.4Support LGs and municipal level disaster management committee on developing TOR defining the roles and responsibilities of each stakeholder and authorities relating to the disaster management/rescueActivity 2.3.1Support to establish early warning communication channel between Palika to Wards to communities and householdsActivity 2.3.2Establish a local emergency operation centre (LEOC) at the Palika level and provide equipment supportActivity 2.3.3Provide training to LEOC focal and its stakeholders on LEOC operations in collaboration with NDRRMAActivity 94.01.01Central Project Advisory meeting at National levelActivity 94.01.02Local Project Advisory Committee Meeting at Palika levelActivity 94.01.03Baseline surveryActivity 94.01.04Mid-team and Endline evaluation (Mid-term) (Consultant)Activity 94.01.05Mid-team and Endline evaluation (Endline)Activity 94.01.06Inception meeting in 5 palika, 2 District and 1 NO (Day Board)Activity 94.01.07Project review reflection meeting among project team (Full Board)Activity 94.01.08Regular project monitoring of ongoing activities (Travel)Activity 94.01.09Financial review and expenditure verification by grants
